DEBUG-CHAIN-APPLY-SLOT.summary: Debug-only Phase C test. On the leader: encode the given slot's kvstore entries into the chain src_pool (packed CHAIN_BATCH format), RDMA-WRITE to F1, send CHAIN-FORWARDED. Each follower decodes via rdmaApplyChainBatch and installs entries via r_allocator + kvstoreDictAddRaw (don't-clobber). Returns the encoded byte length. After running, GET against any follower should return the keys that lived in the leader's slot.
DEBUG-CHAIN-APPLY-SLOT.complexity: O(n_entries) encode + O(length) RDMA WRITE per hop.
